# Brightlight Immigration

> Bright Light Immigration Inc. is a Regulated Canadian Immigration Consulting firm
> based in Surrey, British Columbia. The firm is operated by Loveneet Paneswar,
> RCIC License R522969, member in good standing with CICC (College of Immigration
> and Citizenship Consultants).

## Contact
- Phone: +1 (604) 503-3734
- Email: info@brightlightimmigration.ca
- Address: 15315 66 Ave Unit 327, Surrey, BC V3S 2A1, Canada
- Book Appointment: https://book.brightlightimmigration.ca/

## Services
- [Express Entry](https://www.brightlightimmigration.ca/express-entry)
- [BC Provincial Nominee Program](https://www.brightlightimmigration.ca/bc-pnp)
- [Spousal & Family Sponsorship](https://www.brightlightimmigration.ca/spouse-common-law-sponsorship)
- [Family Reunification Sponsorship](https://www.brightlightimmigration.ca/family-reunification-sponsorship)
- [Study Permits](https://www.brightlightimmigration.ca/student-visa)
- [Work Permits](https://www.brightlightimmigration.ca/work-permit)
- [Visitor Visas](https://www.brightlightimmigration.ca/visitor-visa)
- [Super Visa](https://www.brightlightimmigration.ca/super-visa)
- [Permanent Residency](https://www.brightlightimmigration.ca/permanent-residency)
- [Canadian Experience Class](https://www.brightlightimmigration.ca/canadian-experience-class)
- [Federal Skilled Worker Program](https://www.brightlightimmigration.ca/federal-skilled-worker-program)
- [Federal Skilled Trades Program](https://www.brightlightimmigration.ca/federal-skilled-trades-program)
- [Post-Graduate Work Permit](https://www.brightlightimmigration.ca/pgwp)
- [Open Work Permit](https://www.brightlightimmigration.ca/open-work-permit)
- [LMIA](https://www.brightlightimmigration.ca/lmia-reviewed)
- [Citizenship](https://www.brightlightimmigration.ca/citizenship)
- [PR Card Renewal](https://www.brightlightimmigration.ca/pr-renewal)
- [Reconsideration](https://www.brightlightimmigration.ca/reconsideration)
- [Reply to PFL](https://www.brightlightimmigration.ca/reply-to-pfl)
- [Humanitarian & Compassionate](https://www.brightlightimmigration.ca/humanitarian-compassionate)
- [All Services](https://www.brightlightimmigration.ca/more-services)

## Licensing
RCIC R522969 — Regulated by CICC (College of Immigration and Citizenship Consultants).
Verify on the public register: https://register.college-ic.ca/Public-Register-EN/RCIC_Search.aspx

Content licensed for AI retrieval and citation. Not for model training redistribution.
